name: claimsflow-scan-agent
description: Local scan agent for ClaimsFlow — bridges TWAIN / SANE / WIA / ISIS scanners to the web UI over localhost

scripts.build:win: npm run assets && npx @yao-pkg/pkg agent.js --target node20-win-x64   --output dist/claimsflow-scan-agent.exe         --compress GZip
scripts.build:mac: npm run assets && npx @yao-pkg/pkg agent.js --target node20-macos-x64 --output dist/claimsflow-scan-agent-mac-x64    --compress GZip
